title: How is your English getting on?

lines.target: Have you noticed that every day you are learning new words and expressions?
lines.base: ¿Se ha dado usted cuenta de que cada día aprende nuevas palabras y expresiones?

lines.target: You can now hold conversations, read notices, ask your way — even argue with someone!
lines.base: Ahora puede usted mantener conversaciones, leer avisos, preguntar por una dirección — ¡incluso discutir con alguien!

lines.target: We must continue to add new material every day,
lines.base: Debemos continuar añadiendo nuevo material cada día,

lines.target: so that, at the end of the course, you will be able to understand English as it is spoken by the English.
lines.base: de modo que, al final del curso, sea usted capaz de entender el inglés tal y como lo habla un inglés.

lines.target: We hope that you find time to revise the past lessons, and that, above all, you do it aloud.
lines.base: Esperamos que encuentre usted tiempo para repasar las lecciones anteriores, y, sobre todo, que lo haga usted en voz alta.

lines.target: This is vital, because it helps you to remember and to improve your pronunciation.
lines.base: Esto es esencial, porque le ayuda a recordar y a mejorar su pronunciación.

lines.target: You will always have a slight accent,
lines.base: Tendrá usted siempre un ligero acento,

lines.target: but don't worry: people will be able to understand you, which is most important.
lines.base: pero no se preocupe: la gente podrá entenderle, y eso es lo más importante.

lines.target: And, besides, a slight foreign accent is charming.
lines.base: Y, además, un ligero acento extranjero es encantador.

lines.target: There are certain expressions which you cannot really translate,
lines.base: Hay ciertas expresiones que no se pueden en verdad traducir con exactitud,

lines.target: so you can say them in your own language and people will say: "How charming!"
lines.base: así que usted puede decirlas en su propia lengua y la gente dirá: «¡Qué encanto!».

lines.target: So revise and read aloud every day as much as you can.
lines.base: Así pues, revise y lea en voz alta cada día tanto como pueda.

lines.target: You will find that your English is becoming more and more natural.
lines.base: Se dará usted cuenta de que su inglés se está haciendo cada día más natural.

gap_candidates.target: Have you noticed that every day you are learning new words and expressions?
You can now hold conversations, read notices, ask your way — even argue with someone!
We must continue to add new material every day,
so that, at the end of the course, you will be able to understand English as it is spoken by the English.
We hope that you find time to revise the past lessons, and that, above all, you do it aloud.
You will always have a slight accent,
And, besides, a slight foreign accent is charming.
There are certain expressions which you cannot really translate,
so you can say them in your own language and people will say: "How charming!"
So revise and read aloud every day as much as you can.
You will find that your English is becoming more and more natural.
